member.name: T:Drone_Designer.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository
member.summary:
Read-only data access layer for the component database. Loads components.json via ConfigManager, deserializes each entry into the appropriate ComponentSpec subclass, and exposes typed query methods.
This class never writes to the file. All mutation of component data (if ever needed) must go through a separate write-capable service so that the read/write boundary stays explicit.
Usage: Dim repo As New ComponentRepository() Dim motors = repo.GetMotorsWithMinThrust(500)

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository._componentsById
member.summary: All components loaded from JSON, keyed by their unique ID.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository._componentsByCategory
member.summary: All components grouped by category string (lower-invariant).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.#ctor
member.summary: Loads and deserializes the component database from the path supplied by ConfigManager. Throws if the file is missing, or if the JSON is malformed.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetAll
member.summary: Returns every component in the database as an untyped list. Prefer the typed helpers below for normal use.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetAllByCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all components whose Category matches (case-insensitive). Returns an empty list — never Nothing — when no match.
member.param: One of the canonical category strings: "motor", "esc", "propeller", "flight_controller", "battery", "gps", "telemetry", "camera", "servo", "receiver", "pdb", "airframe_material".

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetById(System.String)
member.summary: Looks up a single component by its unique string ID. Returns Nothing if not found — callers must null-check.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetMotors
member.summary: Returns all motor components as strongly-typed objects.

member.summary: Returns all ESC components.

member.summary: Returns all propeller components.

member.summary: Returns all flight controller components.

member.summary: Returns all battery components.

member.summary: Returns all GPS module components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetTelemetryRadios
member.summary: Returns all telemetry radio components.

member.summary: Returns all camera/sensor components.

member.summary: Returns all servo components.

member.summary: Returns all RC receiver components.

member.summary: Returns all power distribution board components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetMotorsWithMinThrust(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns motors whose maximum single-motor thrust is at least grams.
member.param: Minimum acceptable thrust in grams.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetMotorsByKVRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns motors within a KV range (RPM per volt), inclusive on both ends.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetBatteriesWithMinCapacity(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns batteries with at least mAh capacity.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetBatteriesByCellCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns batteries matching a specific cell count (e.g. 3 for 3S, 4 for 4S).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetESCsWithMinCurrent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns ESCs whose continuous current rating meets or exceeds amps.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetComponentsUnderMass(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns all components whose mass does not exceed . Useful for weight-budget filtering across categories.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetComponentsForTemperature(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns all components whose operating temperature range covers the given environment temperature in degrees Celsius. Components that have not specified temperature limits are included by default (assumed to handle standard ranges).
member.param: Ambient operating temperature to check against.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.DeserializeComponents(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the JSON array into a heterogeneous list of ComponentSpec subclasses. Dispatches on the "category" field of each JSON object so each entry lands in the right concrete type.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.ESCProtocolArrayConverter
member.summary: Reads a JSON string array of ESC protocol names and combines them into a single ESCProtocol Flags enum value via bitwise OR. Handles case-insensitive name matching with common abbreviation variants.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Interfaces.IComponentSelector
member.summary:
Contract for the component selection engine. Takes a fully populated MissionSpecs object and returns a SelectionResult containing the best-fit component for each category, plus any warnings generated during selection.
Keeping this as an interface means the UI layer never depends on a concrete implementation — swap algorithms, mock for testing, or move to a web service later without touching MainForm.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Interfaces.IComponentSelector.SelectComponents(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary: Run the selection algorithm against the component database.
member.param: Mission parameters collected from the UI.
member.returns: A containing one recommended component per category (Nothing if no suitable match exists) and a list of human-readable warnings or notes produced during selection.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow
member.summary: Display-only row object bound to the output DataGridView in MainForm. Every public property name matches a DataGridView column DataPropertyName defined in MainForm.vb so WinForms data binding resolves without any additional column configuration.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Category
member.summary: Component category label, e.g. "Motor", "Battery (LiPo)", "GPS / GNSS Module". Supplied by the presenter (not read from ComponentSpecs).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Manufacturer
member.summary: Manufacturer / brand name (e.g. "T-Motor", "Holybro").

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.ModelName
member.summary: Model name or part number (e.g. "F60 Pro IV", "Here3+").

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.MassGrams
member.summary: Component mass in grams. Included in the summary total (recommended rows only).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.NominalVoltage
member.summary: Nominal operating voltage in volts. For batteries: pack nominal voltage (cell count × 3.7 V). For motors/ESCs: mid-point of operating range. For BEC-powered boards: typically 5 V.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.MaxPowerWatts
member.summary: Maximum rated power consumption or output in watts. Sourced from ComponentSpecs.MaxPowerW (engine-confirmed name).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Dimensions
member.summary: Physical dimensions as a formatted string, e.g. "38 × 38 × 7 mm" or "⌀ 229 mm" for round/circular components.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Interface
member.summary: Communication interface or electrical protocol, e.g. "UART", "DSHOT600", "I²C / UART", "PPM / SBUS".

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.TempRating
member.summary: Operating temperature range formatted as "−20 to +85 °C". "—" when temperature ratings are not populated in the database.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.SelectionNotes
member.summary: Selection rank within the category: "Recommended" — top-ranked candidate (index 0 from engine). "Alternative 2" / "Alternative 3" — lower-ranked options.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.IsRecommended
member.summary: True for the first (highest-ranked) entry in each component category. Used by DisplaySelectionResult() in MainForm.Logic.vb to highlight the row green. Not bound to any DataGridView column.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.FromComponentSpecs(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Creates a from a object, adding the category label, selection rank note, and recommendation flag.
Property mapping (ComponentSpecs → ComponentDisplayRow): Manufacturer ← comp.Manufacturer (assumed) ModelName ← comp.ModelName (assumed) MassGrams ← comp.MassGrams (confirmed) NominalVoltage ← comp.NominalVoltageV (assumed; see TODO below) MaxPowerWatts ← comp.MaxPowerW (confirmed via engine) Dimensions ← comp.Dimensions string OR computed from L×W×H / diameter Interface ← comp.Interface (assumed) TempRating ← formatted from OperatingTempMinC + OperatingTempMaxC
TODOs (verify against ComponentSpecs.vb): • If NominalVoltageV doesn't exist, replace with the correct property name or compute as (OperatingVoltageMinV + OperatingVoltageMaxV) / 2. • If OperatingTempMaxC doesn't exist, use OperatingTempMinC only. • If LengthMm / WidthMm / HeightMm / DiameterMm don't exist, remove BuildDimensionsString() or use the Dimensions string property directly.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.NullOrDash(System.String)
member.summary: Returns or "—" when null / whitespace.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.FormatTempRange(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs)
member.summary:
Formats an operating temperature range for display. • Both limits populated → "−20 to +85 °C" • Min only (OperatingTempMaxC missing or zero) → "−20 °C min" • Neither → "—"
TODO: if ComponentSpecs does not have OperatingTempMaxC, remove the branch that uses it and return only the minimum string.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.BuildDimensionsString(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs)
member.summary:
Builds a compact dimension string from ComponentSpecs. Priority order: 1. comp.Dimensions (pre-formatted string, if populated) 2. L × W × H from LengthMm / WidthMm / HeightMm 3. Diameter from DiameterMm (motors, propellers) 4. "—" fallback
TODO: verify property names (LengthMm, WidthMm, HeightMm, DiameterMm) against ComponentSpecs.vb; rename or remove unused branches.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec
member.summary: Specifications for a propeller blade assembly. Diameter and pitch are the primary aerodynamic sizing inputs. DiameterInches and PitchInches are nested under "dimensions" in the JSON and are lifted to top-level properties via OnDeserialized.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.DiameterInches
member.summary: Blade diameter in inches. Populated from dimensions.diameterInches.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.PitchInches
member.summary: Blade pitch in inches. Populated from dimensions.pitchInches.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.BladeCount
member.summary: Number of blades. Populated from dimensions.bladesCount.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.BoreDiameterMm
member.summary: Bore diameter in mm. Populated from dimensions.boreMm.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.Material
member.summary: Primary blade material.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.IsFoldable
member.summary: True if the blades are foldable. JSON field: "isFolding"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.MaxRPM
member.summary: Maximum safe rotational speed in RPM.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.StaticThrustGrams
member.summary: Static thrust in grams (g). JSON field: "maxStaticThrustG"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.StaticThrustTestRPM
member.summary: RPM at which StaticThrustGrams was measured.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.IsClockwiseRotation
member.summary: True if this is a clockwise (CW) rotation prop.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.Efficiency
member.summary: Efficiency proxy (StaticThrustGrams / mass) — computed.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.OnDeserialized(System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Copies diameter, pitch, blade count, and bore from the nested Dimensions object to top-level properties after JSON deserialisation.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec
member.summary: Specifications for a UAV flight controller / autopilot board. Interface counts (UART, PWM outputs) determine peripheral compatibility.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.Processor
member.summary: CPU / SoC identifier. JSON field: "processorType"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.GyroscopeChip
member.summary: Primary IMU / gyroscope chip. JSON field: "imuPrimary"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.AccelerometerChip
member.summary: Primary accelerometer chip.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasBarometer
member.summary: True if an onboard barometer is present.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.BarometerChip
member.summary: Barometer chip identifier. JSON field: "barometerModel"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasMagnetometer
member.summary: True if an onboard magnetometer is present. JSON field: "hasOnboardMagnetometer"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.UARTCount
member.summary: Number of full hardware UART serial ports.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.I2CBusCount
member.summary: Number of hardware I²C buses. JSON field: "i2cCount"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.SPIBusCount
member.summary: Number of hardware SPI buses. JSON field: "spiCount"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.PWMOutputCount
member.summary: Number of PWM or DSHOT motor/servo output channels.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.AnalogInputCount
member.summary: Number of ADC input channels. JSON field: "analogInputs"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.MaxLoopRateHz
member.summary: Maximum gyro loop rate in Hz. Derived from processor type in OnDeserialized.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasSDCardSlot
member.summary: True if a microSD card slot is present for blackbox logging.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasUSB
member.summary: True if a USB port is present.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasOSD
member.summary: True if the board includes a built-in OSD chip.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasBuiltInVTx
member.summary: True if a built-in VTx is present.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.SupportedFirmware
member.summary: Firmware ecosystem(s) the FC supports.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.FirmwareCompatibility
member.summary: Firmware compatibility as a comma-separated string. JSON field: "firmwareCompatibility" (stored as array in JSON).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.MountingPatternMm
member.summary: Form factor / mounting pattern string. JSON field: "formFactor"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.InputVoltageMin
member.summary: Input supply voltage minimum in Volts (V). JSON field: "inputVoltageMinV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.InputVoltageMax
member.summary: Input supply voltage maximum in Volts (V). JSON field: "inputVoltageMaxV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasBlackbox
member.summary: True if blackbox logging is available (SD slot present).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.OnDeserialized(System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Derives MaxLoopRateHz from processor type after JSON deserialisation. H7 = 8 kHz, F7 = 4 kHz, F4 = 2 kHz, anything else = 1 kHz.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec
member.summary: Specifications for a rechargeable battery pack. The capacity (mAh), cell count (S), and C-rating are the three values most critical to flight-time estimation.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.CapacityMAh
member.summary: Energy capacity in milliamp-hours (mAh).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.CellCount
member.summary: Number of cells wired in series.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.NominalCellVoltageV
member.summary: Nominal pack voltage in Volts (V). JSON field: "nominalVoltageV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.FullChargeVoltagePerCellV
member.summary: Fully-charged cell voltage in Volts (V). JSON field: "maxChargeVoltageV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.MinCellVoltageV
member.summary: Safe minimum discharge cell voltage in Volts (V).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.ContinuousCRating
member.summary: Continuous discharge rate in C. JSON field: "dischargeRatingC"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.BurstCRating
member.summary: Peak burst discharge rate in C. JSON field: "burstRatingC"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.Chemistry
member.summary: Cell electrochemistry type.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.FormFactor
member.summary: Physical form factor.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.DischargeConnector
member.summary: Discharge connector type fitted to this pack. JSON field: "mainConnectorType"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.BalanceConnector
member.summary: Balance connector standard. JSON field: "balanceConnectorType"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.LipoCellCount
member.summary: Engine-facing alias: cell count. The selection engine queries LipoCellCount; maps to CellCount.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.NominalPackVoltageV
member.summary: Calculated nominal pack voltage in Volts (V). Read-only derived: CellCount × NominalCellVoltageV.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.MaxContinuousCurrentAmps
member.summary: Calculated maximum continuous current in Amperes (A). Read-only derived: (CapacityMAh / 1000) × ContinuousCRating.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.MaxUpdateRateHz

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.HorizontalAccuracyMeters

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.HasCompass
member.summary: True if an onboard compass is integrated.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.CompassChip
member.summary: Compass chip identifier. JSON field: "compassModel"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.TrackingChannels
member.summary: Number of satellite channels the receiver can track.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.DefaultBaudRate
member.summary: Default UART baud rate.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.GNSSChipset
member.summary: GNSS chipset inside the module. JSON field: "chipset"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.PCBDiameterMm
member.summary: Diameter of the circular module PCB in mm.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.InterfaceTypes
member.summary: Interface types as a comma-separated string. JSON field: "interfaceType" (stored as string array).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.CurrentDrawMA
member.summary: Current draw in milliamps (mA) at operating voltage. JSON field: "currentDrawMA"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.CurrentDrawA
member.summary: Current draw in Amperes (A). Derived from CurrentDrawMA.

member.summary: Radio carrier frequency in MHz.

member.summary: Active current draw in milliamps (mA). JSON field: "currentDrawActiveMA"

member.summary: Vertical image resolution in pixels.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.FocalLengthMm
member.summary: Focal length in millimetres (mm).

member.summary: True if the camera has an onboard electronic or mechanical image stabiliser. JSON field: "hasElectronicImageStabilization"

member.summary: True if this is a low-latency FPV camera (<30 ms).

member.summary: True if this camera is designed for gimbal mounting.

member.summary: Average power consumption during active recording in Watts (W). JSON field: "powerConsumptionW"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.OperatingVoltageV
member.summary: Operating supply voltage in Volts (V).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.IsThermographic
member.summary: True if this is a thermal/infrared sensor. Derived from SensorType containing "Thermal" or "IR".

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.IsWeatherproof
member.summary: True if camera is weatherproof. JSON field: "isWeatherproof"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.CurrentDrawA
member.summary: Current draw in Amperes (A). Derived from PowerConsumptionWatts / 5V.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.OnDeserialized(System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Derives IsThermographic and IsLowLatency from SensorType after deserialisation.
